message:
feat(search): expand query engine with improved context propagation and search capabilities

- Add anyhow::Context for richer error propagation through query pipeline
- Major expansion of search query building, execution, and result
  processing with improved structured query support
- Update cross-workstream integration tests to match updated query API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
